name: Klukai — Speed Star
description:
"Double cheeked up, on a Thursday afternoon, hella ass..."

Klukai, or HK416, from Girls' Frontline 2: Exilium. Cold as ice, the most elite Doll, Klukai, has arrived, and so victory is forever assured. She’s now the unquestioned leader of Squad 404, her very presence strikes fear in the heart of her enemies, and she writes victory with a brush of brutality. With an iron fist, she will ensure that Squad 404 is steered firmly on the path to excellence. Such is Klukai, passing like thunder and moving like the wind, living with steel resolve. Graceful and cold, she bears herself with complete confidence and will lead H.I.D.E. 404 to excellence. Only those close to the talented Klukai know that behind her strong and severe demeanor there exists a more soft and cherishing side.

up there in my favourites along with Springfield and Ullrid.
creator: Anarchy_Shu
